mobile: skipped intentionally; mobile is outside the current target
flow: switch frontline geometry to 広域警戒線
verify weak-line unit StandingOrder draft and saved-template count
verify BattleState receives mitigated standing orders

verified.deploymentMessage: 東方辺境猟兵隊を右翼泥濘線へ再方針化し、第1戦列歩兵大隊を支援予備に指定した。

battleState.mitigatedUnit: 東方辺境猟兵隊 / 右翼泥濘線 / 弾性防御 / 弾薬節約 / 塹壕線 防衛
battleState.reserveUnit: 第1戦列歩兵大隊 / 後方砲兵線 / 後退守備 / 弾薬節約
battleState.reservePanel: 候補7旅団 / 即応4旅団

notes: The mitigation action saves StandingOrderTemplate drafts, because BattleState currently reads pre-battle StandingOrders from saved templates and deploymentPlan.
The selected reserve unit is also written to deploymentPlan.reserveUnitIds so the battle starts with a visible reserve posture.
